title: Reminders
description: Tests that reminders remain direct and functional instead of being treated as deeper conceptual material.

rounds.prompt: Reminders: call the dentist, return Alex's charger, refill the prescription.
Add reminder to book a passport photo appointment.
Mark the charger reminder as high priority because Alex asked again.

finalAssertions.reason: Reminder handling should stay lightweight and practical.
The system should not infer broader psychological meaning from basic reminders.
